Interface TestNG

All Superinterfaces:
org.aeonbits.owner.Config, EngineProperties<TestNG>, Serializable
@Sources({"system:properties","file:src/main/resources/properties/TestNG.properties","file:src/main/resources/properties/default/TestNG.properties","classpath:TestNG.properties"}) public interface TestNG extends EngineProperties<TestNG>
Configuration properties interface for TestNG execution settings in the SHAFT framework. Controls parallel execution mode, thread count, and suite-level configuration.

Use EngineProperties.set() to override values programmatically: 

SHAFT.Properties.testNG.set().parallel("methods").threadCount(4);
